question: What are MakTek's business hours?
answer: MakTek customer support is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. For urgent technical issues, our 24/7 emergency hotline is available at 1-800-MAKTEK-911.

question: How do I reset my MakTek account password?
answer: To reset your password: 1) Go to the MakTek login page, 2) Click 'Forgot Password', 3) Enter your registered email address, 4) Check your email for a reset link (valid for 24 hours), 5) Create a new password with at least 8 characters including one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.

question: What is MakTek's return policy?
answer: MakTek offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. Items must be returned in original packaging with all accessories. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item. Digital products and software licenses are non-refundable after activation.

question: How can I track my MakTek order?
answer: You can track your order by: 1) Logging into your MakTek account, 2) Navigating to 'Order History', 3) Clicking on your order number. You'll also receive tracking updates via email at the address provided during checkout. Shipping typically takes 3-5 business days for standard delivery.

question: Does MakTek offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, MakTek ships to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping costs vary by destination and are calculated at checkout. Delivery times range from 7-14 business days. Note that customers are responsible for any customs duties or import taxes.

question: What payment methods does MakTek accept?
answer: MakTek accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. For enterprise customers, we also offer net-30 payment terms and wire transfer options. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

question: How do I upgrade my MakTek subscription plan?
answer: To upgrade your subscription: 1) Log into your MakTek account, 2) Go to 'Subscription Settings', 3) Select 'Upgrade Plan', 4) Choose your desired tier (Basic, Pro, or Enterprise), 5) Confirm the upgrade. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle.

question: What is included in MakTek's warranty?
answer: All MakTek hardware products come with a standard 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. This includes free repairs or replacement for hardware failures under normal use. Extended warranties (2-year and 3-year options) are available at purchase. Software products include 90 days of free technical support.

question: How do I cancel my MakTek subscription?
answer: To cancel your subscription: 1) Log into your account, 2) Navigate to 'Subscription Settings', 3) Click 'Cancel Subscription', 4) Provide feedback (optional), 5) Confirm cancellation. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. No refunds are provided for partial months.

question: Can I get a student discount on MakTek products?
answer: Yes! MakTek offers a 20% student discount on all subscription plans and select hardware products. To qualify, verify your student status through our education partner portal using a valid .edu email address or student ID. The discount is valid for up to 4 years or until graduation.

question: How do I contact MakTek technical support?
answer: You can reach MakTek technical support through: 1) Live chat on our website (available 9 AM - 6 PM EST), 2) Email at support@maktek.com (response within 24 hours), 3) Phone at 1-800-MAKTEK-01 (same hours as live chat), 4) Submit a ticket through your account dashboard. Enterprise customers have access to dedicated support channels.

question: What are the system requirements for MakTek software?
answer: Minimum requirements: Windows 10/11 or macOS 11+, 8GB RAM, 2GB available storage, Intel Core i5 or equivalent processor, and stable internet connection. Recommended: 16GB RAM, SSD storage, and dedicated graphics card for optimal performance. Mobile apps require iOS 14+ or Android 10+.

question: Does MakTek offer training for enterprise customers?
answer: Yes, MakTek provides comprehensive training programs for enterprise clients including: 1) On-site training sessions, 2) Virtual workshops and webinars, 3) Self-paced online courses, 4) Dedicated customer success manager, 5) Custom training materials. Training is included with Enterprise plans or available as an add-on for Pro plans.

question: How secure is my data with MakTek?
answer: MakTek employs enterprise-grade security measures including: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.3 for data in transit, regular security audits, SOC 2 Type II compliance, GDPR compliance, and automatic daily backups. We never sell customer data to third parties. Two-factor authentication is available and recommended for all accounts.

question: Can I integrate MakTek with other tools?
answer: MakTek offers integrations with over 100 popular tools including Salesforce, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, Jira, and Zapier. API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Our REST API documentation includes SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Java. Custom integrations can be developed using our webhook system.

question: What is MakTek's data retention policy?
answer: Active accounts: Data is retained for the duration of your subscription plus 90 days after cancellation. Canceled accounts: Data is archived for 1 year, then permanently deleted. You can request immediate data deletion or export your data at any time through the account settings. Deleted data cannot be recovered.

question: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
answer: To report bugs or request features: 1) Log into your MakTek account, 2) Navigate to 'Support' → 'Feedback', 3) Select 'Bug Report' or 'Feature Request', 4) Provide detailed description and screenshots if applicable. You can also visit our public roadmap at roadmap.maktek.com to vote on upcoming features.

question: Does MakTek offer API rate limits?
answer: API rate limits vary by plan: Basic (100 requests/hour), Pro (1,000 requests/hour), Enterprise (10,000 requests/hour or custom limits). Rate limit headers are included in all API responses. If you exceed your limit, you'll receive a 429 status code. Enterprise customers can request custom rate limits.

question: How do I add team members to my MakTek account?
answer: To add team members: 1) Go to 'Account Settings' → 'Team Management', 2) Click 'Invite Member', 3) Enter their email address, 4) Assign a role (Admin, Member, or Viewer), 5) Send invitation. The number of team seats depends on your plan: Pro (up to 10), Enterprise (unlimited). Additional seats can be purchased for $15/month each.

question: What happens if I exceed my MakTek storage limit?
answer: If you approach your storage limit, you'll receive email warnings at 80% and 95% capacity. Upon reaching 100%, you won't be able to upload new files until you: 1) Delete old files, 2) Upgrade to a higher plan, or 3) Purchase additional storage ($10/month per 100GB). Your existing data remains accessible and safe.

question: Can I get a refund after the 30-day trial period?
answer: Refunds after 30 days are evaluated on a case-by-case basis. Contact our billing team at billing@maktek.com with your account details and reason for the request. Annual subscriptions may be eligible for prorated refunds in certain circumstances, such as duplicate purchases or technical issues preventing product use.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication on my MakTek account?
answer: To enable 2FA: 1) Log into your account, 2) Go to 'Security Settings', 3) Click 'Enable Two-Factor Authentication', 4) Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password), 5) Enter the 6-digit code to verify, 6) Save your backup codes in a secure location. 2FA is required for all admin accounts on Enterprise plans.

question: What is MakTek's uptime guarantee?
answer: MakTek guarantees 99.9% uptime SLA for Pro and Enterprise plans, backed by our service level agreement. This equates to less than 8.76 hours of downtime per year. We provide real-time status updates at status.maktek.com. If we fail to meet this SLA, Enterprise customers are eligible for service credits as outlined in their contract.

question: How do I export my data from MakTek?
answer: To export your data: 1) Navigate to 'Account Settings' → 'Data Management', 2) Click 'Export Data', 3) Select data types to include (files, metadata, user data, etc.), 4) Choose format (CSV, JSON, or ZIP), 5) Click 'Request Export'. Large exports may take several hours. You'll receive an email when your download is ready (link valid for 7 days).

question: Does MakTek comply with HIPAA regulations?
answer: Yes, MakTek offers HIPAA-compliant solutions for healthcare organizations on our Enterprise plan. This includes a Business Associate Agreement (BAA), enhanced security controls, audit logging, and encrypted backups. HIPAA compliance features must be explicitly enabled and require additional configuration. Contact our enterprise sales team for more information.

question: What is the protocol for a damaged package or shipment?
answer: If you receive a damaged package: 1) Take clear photos of the damage (box and item), 2) Keep all original packaging materials, 3) Contact MakTek support at support@maktek.com or via live chat within 48 hours of delivery, 4) Provide your order number and photos of the damage. We will investigate the shipping claim and arrange for a replacement or full refund immediately. Do not return the item until instructed by our team.
